sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_test (id UInt32, lon Float64, lat Float64, resolution UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO geo_test (id, lon, lat, resolution) VALUES (1, 37.79506683, 55.71290588, 15);
UPDATE geo_test SET resolution = 10 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT geoToH3(lon, lat, resolution) AS h3Index FROM geo_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geo_test WHERE geoToH3(lon, lat, resolution) != 0;
